title: Triangle Junior Bonspiel
content:
# Triangle Junior Bonspiel

### **Was January 3-4, 2026**

\[The information below pertains to the 2026 event\]

Note: Registration closed on December 19th, 2025

### Format and Entry Requirements

* Can register as a team of four or as an individual. If registering as an individual, coordinators will attempt to find you a team with similar ages and skill level.
* Curling will start Saturday morning and end early Sunday afternoon (likely 2pm).
* 3 game guarantee.
* $40 per curler ($160 per team).
* Meals included: Saturday lunch and dinner, and Sunday lunch
* Off-ice fun included: Board & video games and raffle.

### Location

Triangle Curling Center - 2310 So Hi Drive, Durham, NC 27703 - 4 sheet dedicated curling facility

### Payment and Cancellation Policy

Payment is required to hold your spot. 

Cancellations before December 19th will receive a full refund.

### Questions

[contact email]

---
